steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: In the function $f(x) = 3{,}000(0.75)^x$, the variable $x$ is years after 2008. Setting $x = 0$ gives the population at the starting year 2008: $f(0) = 3{,}000 \cdot (0.75)^0 = 3{,}000 \cdot 1 = 3{,}000$.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: In any exponential model $f(x) = a \cdot b^x$, the coefficient $a$ is the initial value when $x = 0$. Here $a = 3{,}000$ is the population at $x = 0$, which corresponds to 2008.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content:
Evaluate each choice:
  • The estimated percent decrease in the population for this species and area every $8$ years after $2008$
  • The estimated percent decrease in the population for this species and area each year after $2008$
  • The estimated population for this species and area $8$ years after $2008$
  • The matching choice: The estimated initial population for this species and area in $2008$ — D is correct.
